deploy.title: Deploy OpenClaw instance
deploy.description: Fill out the configuration and deploy your OpenClaw instance in seconds.

model.label: What model do you want to use?

communication.label: Which channel do you want to use for chatting?

steps.title: How to get your bot token?

step.3: Follow the prompts to name your bot and choose a username.
step.4: BotFather will send you a message with your bot token. Copy the entire token (it looks like a long string of numbers and letters).
step.5: Paste the token in the field below and click Save & Connect.

note.pricing: $49 per month. Includes $15 in AI credits refreshed monthly.
note.signIn: Sign in to deploy your AI assistant and connect your channels.
note.invalid: Ensure all fields are filled correctly.

deploy.success: Deployment started. This can take a few moments to complete.

approve.success: Device approved successfully. You can now access dashboard from it.
Channel approved successfully. You can now chat with your assistant there.

error.alreadyExists: You already have an instance deployed. You can't deploy another one for now.
error.notFound: You don't have an instance deployed yet. Please deploy one first.
